articleContent:
Dear Rovers,
Thank you for your continued support. The following is a summary of content that will become available in Version 3.2: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows.
 
[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]
✦Maintenance Time: 2026-03-19 04:00 - 2026-03-19 11:00 (UTC+8)
✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2
✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-03-19 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.
※In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.
 
✦Bug Fixes Compensation: Astrite x300
✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-03-19 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.
 
[Version Update Details]
✦New Resonator✦
5-Star Resonator: Sigrika (Aero/Gauntlets)
Sigrika, a student of Startorch Academy and a Resonator of Royan Runes.
Determined to live up to others' expectations and become a true Solsworn, she devotes herself fully to every challenge.
●Combat Roles: Main Damage Dealer, Traction, Echo Skill DMG
※Obtainable through the [When the Runes Glitter] Featured Resonator Convene.
 
✦New Weapon✦
5-Star Weapon: Solsworn Ciphers (Gauntlets)
Sunlight gathers. The answer is made plain. What must be done awaits. The Rein is in your hand. Step forward, toward the sunlit end.
※Obtainable through the [Solsworn Ciphers] Featured Weapon Convene.
 
✦New Enemies✦
Phagosite: Bipolarch, Phagosite: Hysterarch, Phagosite: Miserarch, Fractsidus Milliner, Fractsidus Mawdoll, Fractsidus Ripper
 
✦New Stories✦
[Main Quest] Chapter III Act IV: Gold Suspended in Shadows
Amidst the festive atmosphere of Startorch Academy's New Solar Celebration, President Lucilla detects a mysterious frequency appearing in the Academy's Dark Side—one that does not belong to the Academy. You suspect it may be the "reward" once mentioned by the Grand Architect of the Fractsidus. Determined to uncover the truth behind this anomaly, you venture into the Dark Side alongside Sigrika, a student you encountered there...
 
✦Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.2 update.
✦Eligibility: Complete Segue: Afterstory "All That Sunlight Touches" to unlock.
 
[Segue: Afterstory] Rabbit Reflected in Shades
After the New Solar Celebration comes to an end, Lucilla sends you a WavesLine message, saying that the root of the Dark Side anomaly remains unresolved, and the Academy is still uncertain of Fractsidus's reasoning for tampering with the Dark Side. Lucilla now looks to you to protect the Academy and uncover the mysteries. Meanwhile, a strange rabbit awaits you inside the Dark Side...
 
✦Duration: Permanently available after 2026-04-09 10:00 (server time)
✦Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Act IV "Gold Suspended in Shadows" to unlock.
 
New Permanent Event: Whispers Between Stars
As the Main Quest progresses, unlock side storylines for some Resonators and spend more time with them. Complete tasks in these side storylines to win Astrites, Expedition Motorbike Livery: Memories of the Stars, and more.
✦Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.2 update.
✦Eligibility: Solve the first riddle with Sigrika in Main Quest Chapter III Act IV "Gold Suspended in Shadows" to unlock.
 
✦New Events & Gameplay Features✦
[Special Events]
[Soar to the Beat] Rhythm Challenge Event
Lately, "Stellar Orbit Beats" has been taking the Mind Dive Arcade by storm! It's officially the go-to game for everyone to unwind and have fun here at the Academy. Got a free minute between classes? Grab your friends and let the rhythm carry you on a trip through the stars!
✦Duration: Version 3.2 Update - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)
 
[Lahai-Roi Blocks] Leisure Event
Outside the Mind Dive Arcade, a student named Tetoris beckons you to try the latest "Game of the Year," Lahai-Roi Blocks. The game has many wondrous properties, or so she claims…
✦Duration: 2026-03-26 04:00 - 2026-04-13 03:59 (server time)
 
[Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project!] Leisure Event
At this year's Club Show & Tell, Van Tassie of the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society proudly unveils his latest project: the "F.U.E.L. Optimization Simulator." He claims this game will revolutionize the Academy's culinary experience by gathering the essential data. As is par for the course, your name is on the playtest roster. Yet, something about the project's core design seems... slightly off from the outset.
✦Duration: 2026-04-02 04:00 - 2026-04-20 03:59 (server time)
 
[Knights of the Wild] Featured Challenge Event
The Knights of the Wild, as people call them, are Mechascouts that roam the reaches of Lahai-Roi, sworn to protect those in peril. Now, for the first time, it is the Knights who call for aid.
✦Duration: 2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)
 
[The Flaming Red in Memory] Showcase Event
Platya, a Black Shores Bloom Bearer, has come to Startorch Academy chasing rumors of a Ghost Miko—whispers that seem to echo the legend of the "Lady Miko" of her distant homeland. Intrigued, you join her search.
✦Duration: 2026-04-16 04:00 - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)
 
[Gifts of Solsworn] 7-Day Login Event
During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards from the event page.
✦Duration: Version 3.2 Update - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)
 
[New Gameplay Feature]
[Endstate Matrix] New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge
In Solaris's data space, invisible offenses and defenses occur every day. Before the malice inside the matrix annihilates everything, find it... and put an end to it.
✦Duration: From 2026-03-26 04:00 (server time)
※The first Endstate Matrix Challenge Cycle (Doomsday Cycle) lasts from Version 3.2 to Version 3.4.
 
[Limited-Time Only]
Collab Livery Bundles
The following Expedition Motorbike Collab Livery bundles will be available in the Store: QUEEN and VIOLET.
Remember to check out the Vehicle Looks section of Outfits in the in-game Store for more details.
Availability: 2026-04-09 10:00 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)
 
✦Other New Content✦
●New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Hyvatia
●New Sigils: Astral Flight, Past the Endstate - Doomsday Cycle
●New Title: Matrix Ranger
●New Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Memories of the Stars, Call from Beyond the Stars
※Participate in Rhythm Challenge Event: Soar to the Beat to win Sigil: Astral Flight.
※Participate in New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge: Endstate Matrix to win Expedition Motorbike Livery: Call from Beyond the Stars, Title: Matrix Ranger, and Sigil: Past the Endstate - Doomsday Cycle.
 
[Adjustments and Optimizations]
✦Features✦
●Expedition Motorbike
Optimized Autopilot Mode
- Adjusted the obstacle-avoidance logic in Autopilot Mode to reduce wrong turns while driving.
- Removed Adaptive Hook prompt in Autopilot Mode.
 
●Material Tracking
Optimized Material Acquisition Process
- Selecting the "Tacet Discord" acquisition path after clicking on the icon of a specific Material via Backpack or the Resonators screen now opens the map and tracks Tacet Discords that drop the material within a certain radius of your current location.
- If there are no such Tacet Discords within the radius or all such Tacet Discords have been defeated, Tacet Discords outside the radius will be automatically tracked.
 
✦Leveling✦
●Echoes:
Optimized Echo Filtering
- Refined the filtering logic and made the relevant interfaces more intuitive; the upgraded Echo filtering function applies to Echo-related interfaces, including Echo Backpack and Data Bank.
- Added Batch Discard and Batch Lock, allowing you to Batch Discard or Batch Lock the filtered results.
 
Optimized Echo Backpack Interface and Functionality
- Added a quick access button for Data Merge on the Echo Backpack interface.
- Added Smart Discard, allowing you to discard owned Echoes based on Suggested Plan or Custom Management Plan.
- More well-founded pop-up suggestions based on the number of Echoes you own and the number of Echoes you've discarded; you will be prompted to either Data Merge or Smart Discard Echoes when your Echo Backpack is full.
 
●Echo Management:
Optimized Echo Management
- Adjusted the underlying logic of Echo management; plans can now be edited based on Sonata Effect, and when a a new Echo is obtained, it will automatically be locked or marked for discard according to the Mainstats of the COST4/COST3/COST1 Echoes under each Sonata Effect.
- Added the Suggested Plans feature, allowing you to import recommended management plans with one click.
- Added the Manage Owned Echoes feature, allowing you to batch discard or lock owned Echoes according to enabled current plans.
- Added the Sharing & Importing feature, allowing you to share your Echo configurations by means of a Plan Code or import other Rovers' Echo configurations using their Plan Codes.
- Added the Auto-Discard Non-5-Star Echoes feature, which, when enabled, will automatically mark for discard all non-5-Star Echoes you own or will obtain.
- When resetting your plans, you can choose "Disable Only" or "Clear Plans and Disable" for all the Echo Management plans.
 
●Enhanced Absorption
Adjusted Enhanced Absorption Criteria
- After defeating a Tacet Discord, the base Echo drop rate will be considered first, and if an Echo is dropped on account of the base drop rate, no Enhanced Absorption attempt will be deducted.
- Guaranteed Echo drops during quests do not cost any Enhanced Absorption attempt.
 
✦Challenges, Puzzles, & Events✦
●Ascendant Aces (Resonator Trial Event)
Optimized Reward Claiming
- You can now claim the rewards for Resonators whose trials you've completed in a previous version after entering the event, without having to repeat the challenges.
- All the trials you've completed before the release of Version 3.2 are valid.
- You can still try out a Resonator in Ascendant Aces even if you've completed their trial in a previous version.
 
✦Controls✦
- Optimized the experience of reversing the expedition motorbike on mobile; when reversing is triggered, the joystick control area for reversing will be temporarily expanded.
- Optimized the experience of using Expedition Motorbike-related buttons during certain quests/challenges; custom key bindings for the motorbike will no longer conflict with the buttons involved in these quests/challenges.
 
✦UI✦
●Red Dot Notification
Adjusted Red Dot Notification
- Added a red dot to the access button for the Hazard Revisited event on the Events - Recurring Event page.
- Added cross-device synchronization of red notification dots for certain screens. When you remove red dots from such screens as Featured Event, Resonators, Guidebook, and Expedition Motorbike from one device, the red dots will no longer appear on other devices.
- Adjusted red dot notification on the Expedition Motorbike - Motorbike Appearance screen. You no longer need to click on icons to remove red dots from the Chassis Mod, Livery, and Motorbike Accessory pages; instead, when you obtain new Motorbike cosmetics, animated graphics will be displayed for the unlocked Motorbike cosmetics upon entering the Motorbike Appearance screen, and the red dots will be removed automatically.
※More feedback is being collected on cross-device synchronization of red notification dots. This feature will apply to more screens in future versions.
 
- Adjusted the display on Weekly Challenge-related screens; the number of remaining weekly attempts allowed for claiming rewards is now displayed instead.
- Adjusted UI display during cutscenes. When no input is detected 3 seconds into a cutscene, story-related buttons, such as Skip and Story Review, will be hidden until input is detected.
- Optimized the display for when certain location icons are selected on the Roya Frostlands map. After the Version 3.2 update, selecting certain location icons, such as Soliskin locations, on the Roya Frostlands map will allow you to switch between different layers of the current map.
 
✦Graphics & Performance✦
●PC Graphics
Added Render Distance on PC
- You can adjust Render Distance via Settings > Graphics > Render Distance. Three Render Distance settings are currently available: Default, Far, Farthest.
- The Far and Farthest settings may contribute significantly to the device load. Please choose a suitable setting based on the performance of your device.
- Added interaction effects to some Celebration Balloons on PC.
 
●Mobile Graphics
Added High Quality on Mobile
- Added High Quality as a graphics quality option on mobile above Quality.
- Enabling this option will increase the clarity of in-game visuals on mobile.
- To enable the High Quality option, your graphics card must meet one of the following requirements:
①Snapdragon 8 Elite or newer, or Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 or newer
②MediaTek Dimensity 9400 or newer
③XRing O1
※After the Version 3.2 update, all mobile devices that support High Quality will have their default in-game resolution increased to some extent.
※Due to variations in the in-game settings and system environment, enabling the option may occasionally cause performance issues, in-game glitches, and hardware-related issues. If you encounter any issue, please try switching to a lower setting. If the issue persists, please contact customer support for further assistance.
 
●Graphics Settings
Added Previews for Graphics Settings
- A new button has been added to the right of certain graphics settings; click on it to view a text description of the effects that will be applied after enabling the setting.
- A new button has been added to the right of certain graphics settings; click on it to bring up a visual preview of the effects that will be applied after enabling the setting.
※Please note: The preview content is for demonstration purposes only; the actual in-game effects may vary to some extent from the previews shown.
 
※Bug Fix Notice Regarding Certain Devices:
①The colors of the game might fail to display properly on PCs equipped with RX 9000 series GPUs running on specific driver versions and with Ray Tracing - Global Illumination enabled. The manufacturer has resolved this issue. If you encounter this issue, please try updating your driver version to 26.2.2. Additionally, access to Ray Tracing - Global Illumination will be reopened with the release of Version 3.2 for these devices.
②Character models might fail to load properly on iQOO 15 mobile devices running on specific system versions. The manufacturer has resolved this issue. If you encounter this issue, please check to see if the issue remains in Version 3.2.
 
✦Audio✦
- Optimized some audio/stereo effects.
 
✦Other✦
●Beta Feature
Added "Resource Cleanup" on PC and Mac
- Resource Cleanup allows you to delete the cutscenes that you have watched and are saved in your current game account. You can check the size of the saved cutscenes via Settings > Other > Resource Cleanup and delete them.
※With the Version 3.2 update, approximately 10GB of additional game resources will be downloaded upon launching the game. This increase in download size is due to optimizations and adjustments made to the existing game resource structure. Once the download is complete, the restructuring of the game client's resources will be finalized. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may experience in the meantime. Thank you for your support for Wuthering Waves.
※This feature is at the testing stage and is subject to changes.
 
- Optimized the descriptions of certain in-game settings and functions.
 
[Bug Fixes]
●Resonators & Weapons
- Fixed an issue where Resonator Luuk Herssen's character model might behave abnormally when certain Idle Animations were displayed.
- Fixed an issue where Resonator Luuk Herssen's character model might behave abnormally on the Resonators screen.
- Fixed an issue where the camera shot was pulled in close when Resonator Aemeath cast Resonance Skill - Form Switch to switch from Mech form to herself.
- Fixed an issue where the model of Resonator Aemeath's weapon might behave abnormally after performing Dodge Counter.
- Fixed an issue where certain skill SFX icons failed to display properly when Resonator Aemeath was in mech form.
- Fixed an issue where using Hoverdroid: Shooter did not remove the effects of Optic Camo Resonator Lynae placed on herself.
- Fixed an issue where Resonator Lynae's Character Stories contained textual errors.
- Fixed an issue where the lighting in the animation for Resonator Iuno's Resonance Liberation "Beneath Lunar Tides" failed to display properly.
 
●Enemies & Echoes
- Fixed an issue where the rewards for defeating the enemy "Nameless Explorer" could not be claimed under certain circumstances.
 
●Features
- Fixed an issue where red dots could not be removed from the Pioneer Podcast interface in some situations.
- Fixed an issue where opening "Synthesis" might render the current screen unresponsive.
- Fixed an issue where certain player actions could cause the Resonance Mode Switch icon on the Resonators page to disappear.
- Fixed an issue where accessing a Forgery Challenge domain via Guidebook > Forgery Challenge did not automatically select the domain on the map.
- Fixed an issue where incorrect Dish Types were given for certain dishes in the Culinary Station of the "Roya Frostlands - Startorch Academy" area.
- Fixed an issue where DLSS could not be enabled on some laptops that met the requirements.
- Fixed an issue where the 120 FPS option could not be enabled on some PCs that met the requirements.
- Fixed an issue where the 120 FPS option could not be enabled on some iPads equipped with M5 chips.
- Resolved some known issues that caused the game to crash on iOS.
 
●Challenges, Puzzles, & Events
- Fixed an issue in "Somnium Labyrinth - Rift Runner" where pressing the Go button sometimes failed to jump to the corresponding stage.
- Fixed an issue in the "Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways" event where certain player actions could make it impossible to exit the lineup page after entering it using a controller.
- Fixed an issue in Co-op Mode where the time on the countdown after completing a Tacet Field challenge was abnormal.
- Fixed an issue where the corresponding task was still marked with "Go" on the Activity panel after Fallen Grave Nightmare Nest was cleared.
- Fixed an issue where certain player actions could make it impossible to obtain Musicfly in the "Rinascita - Vault Underground" area.
- Fixed an issue in Soliskin Guide where pressing Shoot while Resonator Aemeath was in mech form could cause the mech to rise.
- Fixed an issue in Induction Cell & Cell Socket where certain player actions could prevent interaction with some Induction Cells through Levitator.
 
●Quests
- Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression in Main Quest "The Star That Voyages Far" where the Resonator could sink below the surface while in the Ginnungamere cabin. If you encounter this issue after the Version 3.2 update, please restart the game to resolve it.
- Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression where toggling between Main Quest "The Star That Voyages Far" and Main Quests from previous versions occurred unexpectedly.
- Fixed an issue in Main Quest "What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing" where Carlotta's character model behaved abnormally during the objective "Search for the mysterious girl in the crowd."
- Fixed an issue in Main Quest "By Moon's Fated Light" where certain player actions could cause the current Resonator to sink below the surface upon opening the secret door during the objective "Investigate the area behind the secret door.
- Fixed an issue in Companion Story "Forking Paths Among the Stars" where Rover's character model, while wearing the Outfit "Perpetual Spark," sometimes behaved abnormally.
- Fixed an issue where certain visual assets in "Roya Frostlands - Giant's Gaze - Spacetrek Observatory" failed to display properly after completing Exploration Quest "Operation: Frontier Renewal."
- Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression in Side Quest "Treasures in the Painting" where the next quest objective did not appear upon reaching the target location using Resonator Aemeath in Mech form.
- Fixed an issue in Side Quest "Moments Captured in Light" where NPC models sometimes behaved abnormally while the photo was being taken during the objective "Take a photo of B.1.N.G.O. and two freshmen."
 
●Environment
- Fixed an issue where the skies failed to display properly in certain parts of the "Roya Frostlands - Mount Gjallar" area.
- Fixed an issue where certain NPC models in the "Roya Frostlands - Startorch Academy" area behaved abnormally.
- Fixed an issue where the snowfield failed to display properly in certain parts of the Roya Frostlands area.
- Fixed an issue where the lighting in certain Honami City scenes failed to display properly.
- Resolved known instances of objects or NPCs floating above the surface.
articleTitle: Patch Notes for Version 3.2: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows
